title: Fermented Kenyan Garlic Crispy Stir-fry
description: A garlicky, crunchy date-night dish featuring orange blossom water and fermented elements, perfect for a keto-friendly meal.
instructions: Peel and finely chop the garlic cloves. Slice the ginger into thin pieces.
Combine chopped garlic, sliced ginger, crispy garlic, fermented vegetables, orange blossom water, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
Gently mix all ingredients until well combined. Let it sit for at least 10 minutes to let flavors meld together.
Heat your preferred cooking oil over medium-high heat in a wok or skillet.
Add the seasoned mixture into the hot pan and stir-fry for about 5-7 minutes, or until vegetables are crispy and fragrant.
Adjust seasoning if needed, then serve immediately while still warm.
